@rhatdan done

@abdelghanimeliani I only see the first comment changed, and the others resolved without a change or comment?  i.e. "docker hub" to "Docker Hub" (we've been burned by that in the past),  and then username instead of password, unless I'm really misunderstanding the code sample.  Thx!
@TomSweeneyRedHat no it was my bad, it is the username
the user must add the password too , i will fix that and push again
@TomSweeneyRedHat , yes you are right , i fixed that
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
okey i will close this PR for now, if anyone is interested with the code in this branch.
